preliminary_estimate_notes: Los Cabos carries a significant coastal premium — construction costs run USD 1,100–1,300/sqm for mid-high spec residential. Pool in coastal environment adds $40K-$50K. Client budget of $200K is substantially below preliminary estimate of $359K. Budget alignment will be critical at Segment G. Architecture fee set at $30,000 USD per seed data payment schedule.
cost_basis_method: parametric — cost per sqm with coastal and pool premiums
